ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution affiliated with the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the roles table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the roles table */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the permissions table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_formats" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the data format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data format */,
  "extension" TEXT /* File extension of the data format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "climate_data_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the climate data table */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "climate_data_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the climate data table */,
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "collaboration_date" TEXT /* Date the collaboration started */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the collaborator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)
column_names: Foreign key referencing the users table
